scripts.ci: pnpm lint && pnpm build && pnpm test

OMNI_SECURITY_JWT_SECRET.description: Required fallback authentication secret. Generate a long random value; clients use it only when sending an HS256 JWT.

OMNI_PROVIDERS_DEFAULT_API_KEY.description: Optional key for the default OpenAI-compatible upstream. Leave blank only for an endpoint that accepts unauthenticated requests.
